description: Swarmer, Inc develops autonomous drone swarm software and artificial intelligence solutions in the United States. The company specializes in software platforms and AI systems for military organizations to deploy and coordinate unmanned systems operations. Its services include autonomous swarm coordination, multi-domain unmanned systems integration, AI-powered collaborative autonomy, and command and control software for distributed robotic operations.
